interfaces.name: ExtractionField
interfaces.signature: interface ExtractionField<T> { value: T; confidence: number; source_text: string; page_number: number; needs_review: boolean; }
interfaces.notes: Generic wrapper reused for every header field and every line-item field; mirrors the Pydantic ExtractionField schema exactly.

interfaces.name: DocumentStatus
interfaces.signature: type DocumentStatus = 'uploaded' | 'ocr_running' | 'extracting' | 'needs_review' | 'approved' | 'failed'
interfaces.notes: Drives status pills on Dashboard and per-file stepper on Upload.

interfaces.name: PipelineStage
interfaces.signature: type PipelineStage = 'upload' | 'ocr' | 'extract' | 'ready'
interfaces.notes: 4-dot stepper stage; failure state carries {stage: PipelineStage, reason: string}.

interfaces.name: LineItem
interfaces.signature: interface LineItem { id: string; line_no: number; material_code: ExtractionField<string>; description: ExtractionField<string>; qty: ExtractionField<number>; uom: ExtractionField<string>; unit_price: ExtractionField<number>; line_total: ExtractionField<number>; requested_delivery_date: ExtractionField<string | null>; is_user_added: boolean; is_deleted: boolean; }
interfaces.notes: Line items are independently add/delete-able; is_deleted is a soft-delete flag, not a splice, so audit trail is preserved.

interfaces.name: PoHeaderFields
interfaces.signature: interface PoHeaderFields { po_number: ExtractionField<string>; po_date: ExtractionField<string>; customer: ExtractionField<string>; buyer: ExtractionField<string>; payer: ExtractionField<string>; bill_to: ExtractionField<{ name: string; address: string }>; ship_to: ExtractionField<{ name: string; address: string }>; ship_to_id: ExtractionField<string | null>; currency: ExtractionField<string>; subtotal: ExtractionField<number>; tax: ExtractionField<number>; total: ExtractionField<number>; }
interfaces.notes: Maps 1:1 to required header fields in the original spec.

interfaces.name: ShipToRecord
interfaces.signature: interface ShipToRecord { id: string; customer_id: string; address_line1: string; address_line2: string | null; city: string; region: string; postal_code: string; country: string; aliases: string[]; }
interfaces.notes: Row shape for ship_to_catalog table and catalog CRUD screen.

interfaces.name: ShipToMatch
interfaces.signature: interface ShipToMatch { best_match: { ship_to_id: string; confidence: number; reason: string } | null; alternates: Array<{ ship_to_id: string; confidence: number; reason: string }>; }
interfaces.notes: Computed by matching_service at extraction/reprocess time, surfaced as the Ship To match card.

interfaces.name: DocumentDetail
interfaces.signature: interface DocumentDetail { id: string; filename: string; status: DocumentStatus; pages: Array<{ page_number: number; image_url: string; width: number; height: number }>; header: PoHeaderFields; line_items: LineItem[]; ship_to_match: ShipToMatch; raw_ocr_text: string; raw_json_pre_repair: string | null; raw_json_final: string; repaired: boolean; error_stage: PipelineStage | null; error_message: string | null; }
interfaces.notes: Full payload for GET /api/documents/{id}, the single source of truth the reducer initializes from.

interfaces.name: DocumentListItem
interfaces.signature: interface DocumentListItem { id: string; filename: string; status: DocumentStatus; uploaded_at: string; confidence_avg: number | null; customer: string | null; }
interfaces.notes: Row shape for Dashboard recent-documents table.

interfaces.name: DashboardSummary
interfaces.signature: interface DashboardSummary { total_uploaded: number; total_processed: number; needing_review: number; average_confidence: number; success_rate: number; }
interfaces.notes: GET /api/dashboard/summary.

interfaces.name: PromptConfig
interfaces.signature: interface PromptConfig { id: string; scope: 'global' | 'customer'; customer_id: string | null; prompt_text: string; version: number; is_active: boolean; }
interfaces.notes: Per-customer rows override/supplement the global row at extraction time.

interfaces.name: AuditAction
interfaces.signature: type AuditAction = 'UPLOADED' | 'OCR_COMPLETED' | 'EXTRACTED' | 'FIELD_EDITED' | 'LINE_ITEM_EDITED' | 'SHIP_TO_SELECTED' | 'REPROCESSED' | 'APPROVED' | 'EXPORTED'
interfaces.notes: Written to audit_log on every persisted (not every keystroke) reducer action.

interfaces.name: DocumentReviewState
interfaces.signature: interface DocumentReviewState { document: DocumentDetail; editedHeader: Partial<PoHeaderFields>; editedLineItems: Record<string, Partial<LineItem>>; selectedShipToId: string | null; activeTab: 'extracted' | 'line_items' | 'raw_ocr' | 'raw_json'; jumpToPage: number | null; hasUnsavedChanges: boolean; isReprocessing: boolean; }
interfaces.notes: Owned by a single reducer+Context per open document, per design_handoff decision. hasUnsavedChanges gates REPROCESS_REQUESTED.

interfaces.name: DocumentReviewAction
interfaces.signature: type DocumentReviewAction = { type: 'FIELD_EDITED'; field: keyof PoHeaderFields; value: unknown } | { type: 'LINE_ITEM_EDITED'; id: string; patch: Partial<LineItem> } | { type: 'LINE_ITEM_ADDED' } | { type: 'LINE_ITEM_DELETED'; id: string } | { type: 'SHIP_TO_SELECTED'; shipToId: string } | { type: 'FIELD_JUMP_REQUESTED'; pageNumber: number } | { type: 'REPROCESS_REQUESTED' } | { type: 'APPROVE_REQUESTED'; override: boolean } | { type: 'RESET_FROM_SERVER'; document: DocumentDetail }
interfaces.notes: Discriminated union consumed by documentReviewReducer(state, action): DocumentReviewState.

interfaces.name: uploadDocuments
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/upload (multipart/form-data, files[]) -> { document_ids: string[] }
interfaces.notes: Kicks off async pipeline per file; client polls or subscribes for status.

interfaces.name: listDocuments
interfaces.signature: GET /api/documents?status=&customer=  -> DocumentListItem[]
interfaces.notes: Backs Dashboard table.

interfaces.name: getDocument
interfaces.signature: GET /api/documents/{id} -> DocumentDetail
interfaces.notes: Backs Document Review screen load.

interfaces.name: patchDocumentFields
interfaces.signature: PATCH /api/documents/{id}/fields (body: Partial<PoHeaderFields>) -> DocumentDetail
interfaces.notes: Persists edited header fields into corrected_results; writes FIELD_EDITED audit rows.

interfaces.name: patchLineItems
interfaces.signature: PATCH /api/documents/{id}/line-items (body: { upserts: LineItem[]; deletedIds: string[] }) -> LineItem[]
interfaces.notes: Batch upsert/soft-delete.

interfaces.name: selectShipTo
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{id}/ship-to (body: { ship_to_id: string }) -> ShipToMatch
interfaces.notes: Manual override of the auto-match.

interfaces.name: reprocessDocument
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{id}/reprocess -> DocumentDetail
interfaces.notes: Re-runs OCR+extraction; server rejects if it would silently clobber unsynced client edits without an explicit force flag.

interfaces.name: approveDocument
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{id}/approve (body: { override: boolean }) -> DocumentDetail
interfaces.notes: Blocks (422) if needs_review fields remain and override is false.

interfaces.name: exportDocument
interfaces.signature: GET /api/documents/{id}/export?format=json|csv -> file download

interfaces.name: searchShipToCatalog
interfaces.signature: GET /api/ship-to-catalog/search?q= -> ShipToRecord[]
interfaces.notes: Manual fallback search in the Ship To match card.

interfaces.name: OCREngine
interfaces.signature: class OCREngine(Protocol): def run(self, image_path: str) -> OcrResult: ...
interfaces.notes: Swappable interface (Tesseract now, cloud OCR later) per ios_architecture_review decision.

interfaces.name: LLMExtractor
interfaces.signature: class LLMExtractor(Protocol): def extract(self, ocr_text: str, prompt: str) -> ExtractionResult: def repair(self, invalid_output: str, prompt: str) -> ExtractionResult: ...
interfaces.notes: extract() failure triggers exactly one repair() retry per spec; both raise on second failure, which sets document.status='failed' with error_stage='extract'.

interfaces.name: documentReviewReducer
interfaces.signature: function documentReviewReducer(state: DocumentReviewState, action: DocumentReviewAction): DocumentReviewState
interfaces.notes: Single reducer per open document; unit-test target for every action listed in DocumentReviewAction.

interfaces.name: ConfidenceBadge
interfaces.signature: function ConfidenceBadge(props: { confidence: number; needsReview: boolean }): JSX.Element
interfaces.notes: Never color-only: always renders numeric percentage + icon per accessibility rule from design_handoff.

interfaces.name: PipelineStepper
interfaces.signature: function PipelineStepper(props: { stage: PipelineStage; failedAt: PipelineStage | null; errorReason: string | null }): JSX.Element
interfaces.notes: 4-dot stepper on Upload screen; red dot + inline reason + stage-scoped retry on failure.
